title: agrostis alba var. diffusa
intro: Agrostis alba var. diffusa, also known as white bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Agrostis alba var. diffusa include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Agrostis alba var. diffusa can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
